interpretation_summary: The replication faithfully executed the preregistered Wilcoxon signed-rank tests comparing average market prices generated by the UNIFORM auction mechanism with the fixed-price benchmark of 1.94.  After correcting a file-path error, the code ran inside a Docker container and produced results for the full sample (n=40) and two robustness subsets.  All p-values were well above 0.05, showing no statistically significant premium of UNIFORM prices over the benchmark, whereas the original study found a strong positive difference (p=0.001).  Thus, the replication does not corroborate the original claim.

fidelity_assessment.method_alignment: Full alignment: The replication used the exact Wilcoxon signed-rank test on group-level mean prices as specified in the preregistration, including dropout and bankrupt robustness filters.

deviations.issue_description: File-path pointing to data directory had to be updated in replication_analysis__py.py.
deviations.impact: Low: purely technical, no effect on statistical results.

deviations.issue_description: Replication relies on an independent UNIFORM sample and a fixed theoretical price (1.94) rather than running a parallel FIXED treatment.
deviations.impact: Moderate: still conforms to preregistration but differs from the original two-treatment comparison; may reduce comparability.

results_comparison.hypothesis_tested: Average market price under the UNIFORM mechanism exceeds the fixed-price benchmark of 1.94 (two-tailed Wilcoxon signed-rank test).
results_comparison.original_results: Wilcoxon signed-rank test comparing UNIFORM prices with FIXED price yielded p = 0.001; direction positive (UNIFORM > 1.94).
results_comparison.replication_results: All groups: T = 389.5, n = 40, p = 0.783; no-dropout: T = 253.5, n = 34, p = 0.452; no-dropout-no-bankrupt: T = 241.5, n = 32, p = 0.674.  None are statistically significant at the 0.05 level and the median price (≈1.97) is only marginally above 1.94.
results_comparison.overall_answer: No — the replication does not reach statistical significance and therefore fails the preregistered criterion for supporting the focal claim.

replication_report: Replication unsuccessful: The new laboratory data do not show a significant price premium for the UNIFORM auction relative to the 1.94 benchmark; p-values (0.45–0.78) contrast sharply with the original p = 0.001.

failure_handling.suggestions: Ensure relative paths inside analysis scripts default to container-mounted volumes to avoid FileNotFound errors.
Future replications could include an explicit FIXED treatment arm to mirror the original two-condition design and improve comparability.

notes: Results may hinge on experimental context and time-variant subject behaviour; a pre/post meta-analysis could explore heterogeneity across waves.  Sensitivity checks on round-level rather than group-level aggregation might also be informative.
